title: Employment Requirements and Restrictions: Medical Examinations and Communicable Diseases
description: This policy addresses medical examination requirements for school district employees and outlines procedures related to communicable diseases in the workplace. It governs when and how employees may be required to undergo health screenings and sets standards for managing situations involving contagious illnesses. The policy establishes the district's authority and approach in protecting the health and safety of staff and students through these employment-related medical guidelines.
